message:
Extract 278 hardcoded strings to i18n translation keys (#4506)

* Extract 278 hardcoded strings to i18n translation keys

Localization pass across layout, shared, and card components:
- 107 new keys in common.json (layout, navbar, sidebar, mission sidebar,
  dashboard header, issue items)
- 171 new keys in cards.json (16 card components including compliance,
  GPU health, trestle, iframe, namespace, network, missions, etc.)
- 32 files updated with useTranslation hooks and t() calls

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Apply code review suggestions: fix i18n key misuse and pluralization issues

- MissionListItem: use existing `layout.missionSidebar.expandToFullScreen` key
- IssueItem line 83: remove `.toLowerCase()` on translated string
- IssueItem line 123: use dedicated `shared.issueItem.replicasReady` key with interpolation
- StreakBadge: use `{ days: streak }` to avoid i18next pluralization; update translation
- common.json: add `replicasReady` key; update `dayStreak` to use `{{days}}`

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kubestellar/console/sessions/c5f08928-db66-43ac-9779-0f05791f9e20

Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
